description_long: This handcart is a rustic, two-wheeled vehicle constructed primarily from wood, featuring a simple yet sturdy frame. The cart has a flat, open load platform with raised side rails and a backrest, providing support for carrying goods. The large wooden wheels are spoked and attached to the sides, allowing for smooth rolling over uneven surfaces. At the front, a long wooden handle extends outward, designed for pulling or pushing the cart by hand. The wood appears weathered and aged, with a natural, unfinished look and some visible wear. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for transporting items in urban or rural settings.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with two large spoked wheels, raised side rails, and a long front handle for manual transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handcart, large spoked wheel, and extended handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open load platform, side rails, and the alignment of both wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the second wheel, side rails, and the handle extending to the right.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open back of the load platform and the two wheels on either side.
attribute_load_platform_design: flat open surface with side rails
